title: October 2015 Back Page — There is a Cooperative Difference.
summary: While all electric utilities offer the same product, where it comes from makes a difference. By Adam Schwartz. In the U.S., most people receive their electricity from one of three types of utilities: investor-owned, municipal-owned or through their electric cooperative, which is owned and controlled...
